name: a11-control
description: Unified control entrypoint for the A11 stack

scripts.build:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:qflush
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:qflush
scripts.doctor:git: git -C ./a11backendrailway ls-remote --heads origin main sync/backend-main-20260328 && git -C ./a11qflushrailway ls-remote --heads origin main deploy/trigger-qflush-20260327
